name: Broccoli and Macaroni San Pierota
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash broccoli and cut into large flowerettes with stalks.
2. Cook the broccoli until crisp tender, then drain.
3. Reserve 2 cups of the broccoli water.
4. In a large frying pan, sauté garlic in olive oil until golden brown.
5. Add the broccoli to the pan and cook for a few minutes.
6. Using the same pan, add tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Simmer slowly for 15 minutes.
7. Cook pasta al dente and drain.
8. Place the cooked pasta in a deep dish.
9. Toss the pasta with tomato sauce.
10. Pour the broccoli mixture on top of the pasta.
11. Add hot pepper flakes and grated Parmesan cheese.
